title: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'company')
author: rigood
body:
I'm trying to read .xlsx file but there's an error.

```js
C:\Users\rigood\Downloads\form-to-excel\node_modules\exceljs\lib\xlsx\xlsx.js:346

model.company = appProperties.company;

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'company')
```

I guess it's because .xlsx file that I'm trying to read is created not by Microsoft Excel but another spreadsheet editor.
It's working fine when I read a normal excel file.

How can I fix this error?

comments.author: idrmn
comments.body:
just open the file in exel and save it without changes
it worked for me

comments.author: OtavioCleyderman
comments.body: Hi, i'm also going through the same problem. But, it would not be viable in my case to open and close the file. Would anyone have another solution? Any way to not need to have this validation?

comments.author: DarkTraveler
lionnnnn
comments.body:
I created the xlsx from npm json2xls, also go through the same problem.
Modify the code in the library yourself => doesn't work.
just open the file in exel and save it without changes => it works.
But How to fix the bug?
